title: pyrolirion tubiflorum
side_effects: Pyrolirion tubiflorum can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing gastrointestinal issues, including nausea and diarrhea, as well as experiencing allergic reactions such as hives and itching. Prolonged consumption can also lead to increased heart rate and blood pressure, potentially causing cardiovascular issues in susceptible individuals. Furthermore, improper use of the plant may result in interactions with other medications, exacerbating conditions such as diabetes and bleeding disorders. In severe cases, improper administration of pyrolirion tubiflorum can even lead to respiratory failure and seizures.
